flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lane Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.3k → $6.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lane Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.3k → $13.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lane Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).
